title: Alumni
description: One of the NYU Global Network's greatest strengths is the bread and reach of our 500,000-person strong alumni network.
text:
Alumni
One of the NYU Global Network's greatest strengths is the bread and reach of our 500,000-person strong alumni network. The NYU Shanghai Center for Career Development encourages NYU alumni from all three portal campuses to participate in our alumni events and be part of our thriving international community. Recent graduates are encouraged to take advantage of the CCD's career resources. And all alumni are more than welcome to interact with current students by joining networking events, sitting on panel discussions, making presentations an area of expertise, or sharing career stories.
Services for Recent Graduates
Career Coaching for Recent Graduates
(Graduated within 1 year)
Job Listings for Recent Graduates
Alumni Involvement
NYU Alumni Executive Mentor Program
Dinner with Six
Distinguished Alumni Speaker Series
Contact us at shanghai.careerdevelopment@nyu.edu to let us know how you would like to contribute!
Contact Info for Alumni Chapters
Shanghai: nyushalumni.shanghai@nyu.edu
Beijing: nyushalumni.beijing@nyu.edu
New York: nyushalumni.newyork@nyu.edu
